name: astrology-insights
description: Comprehensive Vedic astrology engine for Node.js — Panchang, birth charts (Kundli), Vimshottari Dasha, divisional charts, dosha analysis, and planetary remedies. Swiss Ephemeris precision, validated against Drik Panchang.

scripts.build: npx tsc --outDir dist --rootDir . --declaration --skipLibCheck --module commonjs --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule panchang/src/core/constants.ts panchang/src/core/tithi.ts panchang/src/core/nakshatra.ts panchang/src/core/yoga.ts panchang/src/core/karana.ts panchang/src/core/rashi.ts panchang/src/types.ts panchang/src/panchang-v2.ts panchang/src/timings/muhurat.ts panchang/src/timings/kalam.ts panchang/src/monthly.ts

author: Adarsh Srivastava
